connection.title: Store connection
connection.disconnectConfirm: Are you sure you want to disconnect this store?

help.title: Learn more & support
help.body: Visit the Expenzey documentation for connection troubleshooting, usage limits, and billing questions.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.subtitle: Control what happens to synced cloud data when the plugin is uninstalled.

deleteCloudOnUninstall.label: Delete cloud data on uninstall
deleteCloudOnUninstall.help: When enabled, uninstalling the plugin will request deletion of synced store data from Expenzey servers. This cannot be undone.
deleteCloudOnUninstall.saveError: Failed to save setting. Please try again.

welcome.title: Welcome to Expenzey
welcome.subtitle: Connect your WooCommerce store to unlock AI-powered insights. You will review and accept the data processing disclosure before any store data is synced.

connect.description: Review what data is shared, then connect your WooCommerce store to Expenzey Scout.

consent.title: Data processing disclosure
consent.intro: When you connect, Expenzey Scout sends the following data to Expenzey cloud services so we can generate analytics and AI insights:
consent.itemSite: Site URL, installation ID, and store currency
consent.itemOrders: Order metrics with hashed customer identifiers (not raw email addresses)
consent.itemProducts: Product catalog data (names, prices, categories, stock, sales counts)
consent.itemChat: Messages you send in the AI chat widget
consent.thirdParty: AI features use Google Gemini to generate reports and chat replies. Optional license checkout may use Freemius.
consent.checkbox: I understand and consent to this data processing.

pro.heroTitle: Unlock the Full Power of Expenzey Scout
pro.heroSubtitle: Get unlimited AI insights, advanced reports, and priority support to grow your WooCommerce store.
pro.alreadyProSubtitle: All Pro features are unlocked for your store.
pro.activationSuccess: License activated. Pro features are now unlocked.

pro.licenseSubtitle: Enter your license key to unlock all Pro features and take your store performance to the next level.
pro.licenseSecure: Your license key is encrypted and secure.
pro.purchaseSubtitle: Unlock the full Pro experience with unlimited AI insights, richer historical reporting, and deeper opportunity analysis - everything you need to make smarter decisions and grow revenue faster.
pro.purchaseBenefit1: Unlock every Pro feature across reports, opportunities, and AI chat
pro.purchaseBenefit2: Ask unlimited AI questions about your store without monthly caps
pro.purchaseBenefit3: Access deeper insights and full historical data to spot long-term trends
pro.purchaseBenefit4: Get priority support when you need help with setup or billing
pro.purchaseBenefit5: Cancel your subscription anytime with no long-term commitment
pro.pricingModalSubtitle: Review plan options below, then continue to secure checkout to complete your purchase.
pro.pricingModalSecureNote: Payments are processed securely by Freemius. You can return here anytime before completing checkout.
pro.pricingModalCheckoutUnavailable: Freemius checkout is not available. Ensure the Freemius SDK is installed and plugin keys are configured.

drawer.actionPlanIntro: Create an action plan for this opportunity:

typeFocus.risingProduct: Capitalize on this product's growth momentum with inventory and merchandising.
typeFocus.bundleOpportunity: Pair these products to increase average order value through bundling.
typeFocus.decliningProduct: Act early to reduce revenue risk from declining product performance.
typeFocus.customerRetention: Strengthen retention momentum with targeted loyalty and win-back tactics.
typeFocus.reviewComplaint: Address rising complaint themes to protect customer satisfaction.
